flows.title: MCP tool: search
flows.summary: Hybrid vector + FTS file-level discovery with path and extension filters; returns ranked file paths with snippet previews.

stateChanges.to: logged query with result count, top score, top path, durationMs
stateChanges.description: Each search call writes an analytics row used by search_analytics.

flows.title: MCP tool: read_relevant
flows.summary: Returns ranked chunk bodies with exact line ranges plus inline annotations, instead of just file paths.

stateChanges.to: logged query with result count and durationMs
stateChanges.description: Like search, read_relevant logs each chunk-level query for analytics.

flows.title: MCP tool: search_symbols
flows.summary: Direct symbol-name lookup against the persisted symbol table — finds functions, classes, types by name without semantic search.

flows.title: MCP tool: write_relevant
flows.summary: Suggests the best existing file and anchor in which to add new code or documentation.

flows.title: MCP tool: index_files
flows.summary: Re-indexes the project (or a glob subset) through the indexing pipeline; prunes deleted files when no patterns are passed.

stateChanges.to: refreshed rows for changed files; pruned rows for removed files
stateChanges.description: indexDirectory upserts file/chunk rows and, when prune=true, removes rows whose files no longer match include patterns.

stateChanges.to: progress and 'done' lines with file/chunk totals
stateChanges.description: Indexer progress callback writes per-file percentages to the status file.

flows.title: MCP tool: index_status
flows.summary: Reports indexed file count, chunk count, and last-indexed timestamp for the current project.

flows.title: MCP tool: remove_file
flows.summary: Removes a single file's rows from the index without re-indexing the whole project.

stateChanges.to: null (row and chunks deleted)
stateChanges.description: db.removeFile deletes the file row and cascades to chunks, symbols, and dependency edges.

flows.title: MCP tool: project_map
flows.summary: Builds a focused dependency-graph view around a file or directory, in text or JSON form.

flows.title: MCP tool: find_usages
flows.summary: Resolves every call site of a symbol via the persisted symbol-reference tables and groups them by file.

flows.title: MCP tool: depends_on
flows.summary: Lists files imported by a given file (outgoing dependencies) using stored import edges.

flows.title: MCP tool: depended_on_by
flows.summary: Lists files that import a given file (reverse dependencies / blast radius).

flows.title: MCP tool: annotate
flows.summary: Attaches a persistent note to a file or symbol; embedded so it can surface inline during read_relevant.

stateChanges.from: null or previous note for path+symbol
stateChanges.to: upserted note with embedding and author
stateChanges.description: upsertAnnotation embeds the note text and writes or replaces the row keyed by path + symbol.

flows.title: MCP tool: get_annotations
flows.summary: Retrieves persistent notes by path, by semantic query, or both — used to surface caveats before editing.

flows.title: MCP tool: delete_annotation
flows.summary: Removes a single annotation by id once the underlying bug or constraint is gone.

stateChanges.to: null (row deleted)
stateChanges.description: db.deleteAnnotation removes the row, after which it no longer surfaces in read_relevant.

flows.title: MCP tool: create_checkpoint
flows.summary: Saves a checkpoint row (decision/milestone/blocker/etc.) tagged to the current session and turn, with embedded summary for later search.

stateChanges.to: new row with session id, turn index, type, title, summary, files, tags, embedding
stateChanges.description: db.createCheckpoint persists the checkpoint and its embedding so future sessions can list and semantically search it.

flows.title: MCP tool: list_checkpoints
flows.summary: Lists checkpoints across sessions, most recent first, with optional session and type filters.

flows.title: MCP tool: search_checkpoints
flows.summary: Semantic search over checkpoint titles and summaries using stored embeddings.

flows.title: MCP tool: search_conversation
flows.summary: Hybrid vector + BM25 search over indexed Claude Code conversation turns, with optional session filter.

flows.title: MCP tool: search_analytics
flows.summary: Aggregates the search_queries log into totals, zero-result and low-score query lists, and top searched terms.

flows.title: MCP tool: git_context
flows.summary: Runs git status/log/diff to summarise uncommitted changes, recent commits, and changed files, annotating each path with index status.

flows.title: MCP tool: search_commits
flows.summary: Hybrid vector + FTS search across indexed git commit history with author/date/path filters.

flows.title: MCP tool: file_history
flows.summary: Returns indexed commits that touched a given file, newest first, without invoking git.

flows.title: MCP tool: server_info
flows.summary: Reports resolved project dir, DB location, index status, embedding model, active config, and connected DBs.

flows.title: MCP tool: wiki
flows.summary: Runs a step of the wiki rebuild workflow (shape, prefetch, discovery, validate, write) selected via colon selectors.

stateChanges.to: regenerated prefetch and validated discovery shape
stateChanges.description: The rebuild driver writes the prefetch JSON, then accepts a discovery JSON and validates its shape and referenced paths.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs init
flows.summary: Creates default .mimirs/config.json, registers MCP config snippets for selected IDEs, and optionally runs the first index.

stateChanges.item: mimirs setup files (.mimirs/config.json, IDE MCP config, .gitignore)
stateChanges.to: config + MCP snippets + .gitignore entries written
stateChanges.description: runSetup writes the project's default config, IDE MCP snippets, and ensures .mimirs/ is gitignored.

stateChanges.to: populated files/chunks/symbols rows
stateChanges.description: When confirmed, init calls indexDirectory to perform the first full index.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs index
flows.summary: Indexes files in a directory with terminal progress; supports --patterns for partial refresh and --verbose for per-file output.

stateChanges.to: refreshed rows for changed files; pruned rows for removed files
stateChanges.description: indexDirectory does an incremental update of all matching files and prunes outdated rows.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs search
flows.summary: Runs a hybrid vector + FTS query from the shell and prints the top file matches with snippets.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs read
flows.summary: CLI counterpart to read_relevant — prints ranked chunk content with exact line ranges.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs serve
flows.summary: Bootstraps the MCP stdio server; delegates to startServer for tool registration, transport, and background indexing.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs status
flows.summary: Prints index totals (files, chunks, last-indexed) for the given project directory.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs cleanup
flows.summary: Removes mimirs artifacts: the .mimirs/ data directory, the instructions block in agent files, and the MCP server entry in IDE configs.

stateChanges.from: present in project and IDE configs
stateChanges.to: removed (with confirmation)
stateChanges.description: cleanup deletes the .mimirs data directory, strips the mimirs instructions block from agent files, and removes the mimirs MCP entry from IDE config files.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs doctor
flows.summary: Diagnoses MCP server startup: checks for native modules, SQLite availability, embedding model load, and prints actionable fixes.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs demo
flows.summary: Runs an interactive feature demo against a small sample to show search/read/map output shapes.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs map
flows.summary: Generates a project dependency graph from the CLI in Mermaid (or focused) format.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs remove
flows.summary: Removes a single file from the index via the CLI.

stateChanges.to: null (rows deleted)
stateChanges.description: db.removeFile deletes the file row and associated chunks.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs history
flows.summary: Subcommand group for git history: `history index` populates the commit table, `history search` queries it, `history status` reports counts.

stateChanges.to: rows for every commit since the last-indexed hash
stateChanges.description: indexGitHistory parses git log and inserts commit rows with embeddings into the DB.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs conversation
flows.summary: Subcommand group for conversation history: `conversation index` ingests session JSONL files, `conversation search` queries turns, `conversation sessions` lists them.

stateChanges.to: rows for each new turn in each session JSONL
stateChanges.description: indexConversation reads session JSONL files and inserts new turn rows with embeddings.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs checkpoint
flows.summary: Subcommand group for checkpoints: `checkpoint create` saves one, `checkpoint list` enumerates them, `checkpoint search` queries by meaning.

stateChanges.to: new checkpoint row with embedding
stateChanges.description: Embeds title + summary and persists a checkpoint, mirroring the create_checkpoint tool.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs annotations
flows.summary: Lists annotations for the project (or filtered by path) from the CLI.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs analytics
flows.summary: Prints search usage analytics from the CLI over a configurable look-back window.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs session-context
flows.summary: Prints a session start summary: recent checkpoints, recent git changes, and active annotations to brief a new agent.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs eval
flows.summary: Runs A/B evaluation comparing answers produced with and without RAG against a fixture file.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs benchmark
flows.summary: Runs search quality benchmarks against a fixture file and reports relevance metrics.

flows.title: CLI: mimirs benchmark-models
flows.summary: Benchmarks multiple embedding models against the same fixture to compare retrieval quality.

flows.title: Server start: MCP stdio boot
flows.summary: Boots the mimirs MCP server: registers tools, connects stdio transport, runs background indexing under a process-level lock, and tails the current conversation session.

stateChanges.to: 'starting' then 'done' with version, totals, and watcher progress
stateChanges.description: writeStatus is called at every boot phase so external clients can see the server's lifecycle.

stateChanges.to: held by this process (when first to start in the project)
stateChanges.description: Only the lock holder runs the background indexer and watcher; other instances run in query-only mode.

stateChanges.to: refreshed (background indexDirectory + watcher updates on file change)
stateChanges.description: After connecting the transport, the server kicks off indexDirectory and then a file watcher, so the index stays current.

stateChanges.item: conversation index for the current session
stateChanges.to: turns appended as the session JSONL grows
stateChanges.description: startConversationTail follows the active session's JSONL and indexes older sessions in the background.

pages.title: Tool: search
mustCover: Inputs: query, top, extensions, dirs, excludeDirs, directory
Hybrid scoring: vector + FTS with config.hybridWeight
Output shape: ranked file paths with snippet previews and timing
Side effect: writes a search_queries analytics row

pages.title: Tool: read_relevant
mustCover: Returns chunk bodies with exact line ranges
Inline [NOTE] blocks from annotations
Filters: extensions/dirs/excludeDirs/threshold
Difference from search (chunk-level vs file-level)

pages.title: Tool: search_symbols
mustCover: Symbol-name lookup against the persisted symbol table
Filters by type (function/class/interface/type/enum/export)
List-all-exports mode when no symbol is given
Enrichment data: hasChildren, referenceCount, isReexport
outputs: ranked symbol matches with file and line

pages.title: Tool: write_relevant
mustCover: Picks the most semantically appropriate file and anchor
Used before adding new code or docs
Inputs: query, file-type hint, directory
Output shape: suggested path and anchor
outputs: suggested file path and insertion anchor

pages.title: Tool: index_files
mustCover: Full vs pattern-scoped indexing (prune semantics)
Progress callback writing to .mimirs/status
Query-only fallback when another mimirs process owns the lock
DB tables updated: files, chunks, symbols, dependencies

pages.title: Tool: index_status
mustCover: Reads totalFiles/totalChunks/lastIndexed from the DB
Pure read tool — no state changes
Difference from server_info (which adds config and connections)
outputs: file count, chunk count, last indexed timestamp

pages.title: Tool: remove_file
mustCover: Deletes the file row and cascades to chunks and references
Idempotent — returns a 'not in index' message when absent
Use case: prune a file faster than waiting for index_files prune

pages.title: Tool: project_map
mustCover: Focus on a file's neighborhood
Zoom levels: file vs directory
Output formats: text vs json with fan-in/fan-out metrics
Source of truth: dependency edges in the DB

pages.title: Tool: find_usages
mustCover: Exact vs substring matching
Why it is more reliable than grep (handles aliased imports/re-exports)
Output grouped by file with line numbers
outputs: usages grouped by file with line and snippet

pages.title: Tool: depends_on
mustCover: Resolved imports for a single file
Inverse of depended_on_by
Edge data: import source string
outputs: list of imported files with import source

pages.title: Tool: depended_on_by
mustCover: Reverse import graph — who imports this file
Use case: blast radius before a rename or signature change
Difference from find_usages (file-level vs symbol-level)

pages.title: Tool: annotate
mustCover: Inputs: path, note, symbol (optional), author (defaults to agent)
Note is embedded so semantic search works later
Upsert behavior — second call replaces previous note for same path+symbol
Output surfaces inline in read_relevant

pages.title: Tool: get_annotations
mustCover: Three modes: by path, by query, by path+query
Output formatting (id, path, symbol, author, timestamp)
When to use vs the inline [NOTE] surface in read_relevant

pages.title: Tool: delete_annotation
mustCover: Deletes by numeric id from get_annotations
When to use (fixed bug, lifted constraint, deleted file)
Behavior when id is missing

pages.title: Tool: create_checkpoint
mustCover: Allowed types (decision/milestone/blocker/direction_change/handoff)
Session and turn binding via discoverSessions + getTurnCount
Embedding of title + summary for later search
Recommended usage as the final step of a task

pages.title: Tool: list_checkpoints
mustCover: Cross-session default
Filters: sessionId, type, limit
Output format with files and tags

pages.title: Tool: search_checkpoints
mustCover: Semantic search over title + summary embeddings
Optional type filter
Score formatting

pages.title: Tool: search_conversation
mustCover: Hybrid vector + BM25 over conversation_turns
FTS fallback to vector-only on FTS error
Output: turn index, timestamp, tools used, files referenced
Where the turn data comes from (conversation tail in server start)

pages.title: Tool: search_analytics
mustCover: Aggregated metrics: totalQueries, avgResultCount, avgTopScore, zero-result rate
Top searched terms, zero-result queries, low-score queries
Configurable look-back via days
Source data: rows written by search and read_relevant

pages.title: Tool: git_context
mustCover: Sections: uncommitted changes, recent commits, changed files, optional diff
Annotates each path with [indexed] or [not indexed]
Flags: since, include_diff, files_only
Behavior when not a git repo

pages.title: Tool: search_commits
mustCover: Hybrid vector + FTS scoring with 0.7 weight
Filters: author, since, until, path, threshold
Empty-index hint pointing at history index
Output: shortHash, score, date, author, message, files

pages.title: Tool: file_history
mustCover: Suffix-match on path
Sorting: newest first
Optional since filter
Backed by the same git_commits table as search_commits
outputs: commits touching the file with stats

pages.title: Tool: server_info
mustCover: Sections: Server, Index, Embedding, Config, Connected Databases
Embedding model id and dimension
Active config keys (chunkSize, chunkOverlap, hybridWeight, include/exclude)
Per-DB opened/last_active durations

pages.title: Tool: wiki
mustCover: Supported commands and colon selectors (shape, prefetch, prefetch:map:<path>, discovery, validate-discovery, write, write:page:<slug>, validate-pages)
Workflow order: shape -> prefetch -> discovery -> validate-discovery -> write -> validate-pages
Outputs: wiki/_prefetch.json, wiki/_discovery.json, wiki/<slug>.md
Validation of discovery shape and referenced paths

pages.title: CLI: init
mustCover: --ide flag and supported targets (claude/cursor/windsurf/copilot/all)
MCP snippet for unknown IDEs
Optional first index after confirmation
.mimirs/status progress writes

pages.title: CLI: index
mustCover: --patterns flag and prune semantics
--verbose vs quiet progress output
Effect on the DB (files/chunks/symbols)

pages.title: CLI: search
mustCover: --top flag
Output format with score, path, snippet
Difference from `mimirs read` (file-level vs chunk-level)

pages.title: CLI: read
mustCover: --top, --threshold, --dir flags
Chunk-level output with line ranges
Inline annotation rendering
outputs: ranked chunks with line ranges and inline annotations

pages.title: CLI: serve
mustCover: Dynamic import of serveCommand to keep doctor working without native modules
Hand-off to startServer
Stdin/signal-driven shutdown
Diagnostic log at .mimirs/server-error.log on crash

pages.title: CLI: status
mustCover: Reads file/chunk totals from the DB
Last indexed timestamp
When to prefer this over index_status or server_info

pages.title: CLI: cleanup
mustCover: Removes the .mimirs/ data directory
Strips the mimirs instructions block from agent markdown files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, etc.)
Removes the mimirs entry from IDE MCP config files
Confirmation prompt unless -y passed
outputs: list of removed files and stripped blocks

pages.title: CLI: doctor
mustCover: Why doctor avoids importing serve transitively
Checks performed (Bun, SQLite, sqlite-vec, embedding model)
Output sections and actionable fixes
Relationship to .mimirs/server-error.log
outputs: diagnostic report with pass/fail per check

pages.title: CLI: demo
mustCover: Walkthrough of search/read/map output
Sample data the demo uses
Intended audience (first-time users)
openQuestions: Confirm whether the demo indexes a sample or uses an existing index

pages.title: CLI: map
mustCover: --focus and --zoom flags
Mermaid output for VS Code's built-in preview
Difference from the project_map tool (CLI prints text)

pages.title: CLI: remove
mustCover: Single-file removal from the index
When to prefer over a full re-index

pages.title: CLI: history
mustCover: Subcommands: index, search, status
--since for incremental indexing
Hybrid scoring with 0.7/0.3 weight
When to run history index (prerequisite for search_commits / file_history)

pages.title: CLI: conversation
mustCover: Subcommands: search, sessions, index
Where session JSONL files come from (Claude Code project dir)
Relationship to the conversation tail started by server start

pages.title: CLI: checkpoint
mustCover: Subcommands: create, list, search
--files and --tags on create
Filtering by type
Parity with the create_checkpoint / list_checkpoints / search_checkpoints tools

pages.title: CLI: annotations
mustCover: Path filter (--path)
Output format (id, path, symbol, author, timestamp)
Read-only — does not call annotate

pages.title: CLI: analytics
mustCover: --days window
Output sections (totals, top, zero-result, low-score)
How to act on zero-result queries (index missing topics)

pages.title: CLI: session-context
mustCover: What the summary contains (recent checkpoints, git changes, annotations)
Use case at session start
Composition of git_context + list_checkpoints + get_annotations
outputs: text summary for a new session

pages.title: CLI: eval
mustCover: Fixture file format
A/B output (with vs without RAG)
--out option for saving results
openQuestions: Document the exact fixture schema once stabilised

pages.title: CLI: benchmark
mustCover: Fixture-based search quality benchmark
Reported metrics (precision, recall, MRR)
Relationship to benchmark-models

pages.title: CLI: benchmark-models
mustCover: Multiple embedding models compared on the same fixture
Output table with per-model metrics
How model selection feeds back into config

pages.title: Server: MCP stdio start
mustCover: Boot phases written to .mimirs/status
Transport connect before slow startup work (avoids client timeout)
Process-level index lock and query-only fallback
Background index + watcher
Conversation tailing for the current session
Shutdown handlers (signals, stdin EOF, uncaught exceptions)
Permanent vs transient DB open errors
Crash logging to .mimirs/server-error.log

pages.title: Architecture
mustCover: Two front doors: MCP stdio server and the mimirs CLI, both backed by the same SQLite DB
Tool/command handlers delegate to shared services (indexer, search, graph, conversation, git, wiki)
Embeddings module as a cross-cutting dependency
Process-level index lock keeping multiple mimirs instances safe
Status file and error log surfaces for external observability

pages.title: Data model
mustCover: Core tables: files, chunks, symbols, references, dependencies
Auxiliary tables: annotations, checkpoints, sessions, conversation_turns, git_commits, search_queries
Vector storage via sqlite-vec and FTS indices
Cascade behavior on file removal
Where embeddings are written and where they are read

pages.title: Module map
mustCover: Top-level dirs: cli/, server/, tools/, indexing/, search/, graph/, db/, embeddings/, conversation/, git/, wiki/, utils/, config/
Direction of imports (handlers depend on services, services depend on db + embeddings + utils)
Why server and CLI share tools/* via resolveProject
Wiki module as a self-contained sub-pipeline

pages.title: Runtime lifecycle
mustCover: Boot order: status write -> signal handlers -> server create -> tool registration -> transport -> DB preflight -> config load -> index lock -> background index -> watcher -> conversation tail
Why transport connects before slow startup work
Per-project DB cache (dbMap) and lazy open semantics
Shutdown: stdin EOF, SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP, uncaught exceptions, status file rewrites
Crash diagnostics path (.mimirs/server-error.log)

pages.title: Configuration
mustCover: Sources of config: .mimirs/config.json, env vars (RAG_PROJECT_DIR, RAG_DB_DIR, LOG_LEVEL), CLI flags
Default values and precedence
Embedding config application (applyEmbeddingConfig)
Where each setting is read (chunkSize, chunkOverlap, hybridWeight, searchTopK, include/exclude, indexBatchSize, indexThreads)
How init seeds the project config
